meaning: n.怀特霍尔(伦敦的一条街名),白厅,英国政府
examples: Whitehall said that it hoped to get the change through by the end of June.
Tony Blair and Gordon Brown talked excitedly about “transforming” Whitehall and its fuddy-duddy ways.
The committee is conducting an ongoing enquiry into the relationship between Wales and Whitehall.
To get there from Manhattan, hop the Staten Island Ferry from Whitehall Terminal.
